name: Australian Sticky Toffee Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates and baking soda in a heat-proof bowl.
2. Pour boiling water on top and leave to stand.
3. Cream butter and sugar until pale.
4. Add eggs one at a time, heating well after each addition.
5. Gently fold in sifted flour.
6. Stir in the date mixture.
7. Pour into a lightly buttered 18cm or 7-inch square or round cake tin.
8. Bake in a preheated oven (180°C) for 30-40 minutes, until an inserted skewer comes clean.
To prepare toffee sauce:
1. Combine sugar, cream, vanilla essence, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Bring to the boil, stirring, and simmer for five minutes.
3. Set aside until ready to serve.
4. Quickly reheat when needed.
5. Cut pudding into squares and place each square in the centre of a warm dinner plate.
6. Pour hot toffee sauce over each square and serve with fresh cream.
